name: Nordic Financial MCP
description: Semantic search across 173,000+ Nordic financial documents — company filings, macro data, press releases from Norway, Sweden, Denmark, and Finland

examples.title: Search Equinor filings
examples.description: Find dividend information and financial results

examples.title: Norwegian macro data
examples.command: search_filings query="Norwegian house prices Q3 2024" country=NO report_type=macro_summary

examples.title: Swedish press releases
examples.command: search_filings query="strategic acquisition" country=SE report_type=press_release limit=10
